sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99315" key="sunanqomologe/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνανθομολογέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n99315.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">assent</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινι</itype> Aristeas <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0526.tlg001.perseus-grc1:252" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">252</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
